description_long: This house features a minimalist, modern cubic design with a predominantly gray concrete exterior. The structure is composed of clean, straight lines and flat surfaces, with a flat roof that includes a prominent white dome and an open terrace area. Windows are arranged in a vertical, asymmetrical pattern, varying in size and placement across the facades. The front elevation is defined by a series of steps leading to a recessed entryway, partially sheltered by an overhang and flanked by a geometric arrangement of railings. The building sits on a raised platform with black and white striping, and the rear includes a stepped pathway and a large, open terrace. The overall aesthetic is stark and contemporary, emphasizing function and geometric form.
description: A modern, cubic house with a gray concrete exterior, flat roof, white dome, and asymmetrical vertical windows. Features include a stepped entryway, open terrace, and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the stepped entryway, vertical windows, and the white dome on the roof.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the open terrace, staircases, and a more complex arrangement of railings and platforms.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the stepped pathway, a large terrace, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays a plain facade with a few vertical windows and the dome partially visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with steps, partial overhang, and minimalist railings
